steps.name: Wire TUI module and add ratatui/crossterm/ctrlc dependencies
criteria: Add `mod tui;` to src/main.rs binary crate
Add ratatui="0.30", crossterm="0.28", ctrlc="3.4" to Cargo.toml
All tests in tui_job_applications_scenarios.rs compile (still #[ignore])
`cargo check` passes on Rust >=1.88 inside devenv shell
steps.implementation_notes: Run all cargo commands inside `devenv shell` (Rust >=1.88). The tui module is already declared in lib.rs; only main.rs needs the declaration for the binary crate. Existing scaffold stubs in src/tui/ must already compile.

steps.name: Implement load_all_applications() database adapter
criteria: load_all_applications() returns Result<Vec<Cv>, Box<dyn Error>>
Uses establish_connection_postgres() + Diesel select on cvs table
us01_e01 passes: returns Err when DATABASE_URL is not set

steps.name: Implement ApplicationRow, AppState::new(), From<Cv>
criteria: ApplicationRow has id, date, company, job_title, pdf_path fields (no quote)
From<Cv> maps all fields; date falls back to 'Unknown' when application_date is None
AppState::new(rows) starts at index 0, empty filter, Normal mode
is_empty() and status_text() work; us01_s01..s04 pass

steps.name: Implement TerminalGuard and startup probe
criteria: TerminalGuard::new() enters raw mode and restores terminal on Drop
probe::run_startup_probe() returns Err with TTY message when stdin is not a TTY
ws_01 passes: non-TTY subprocess exits non-zero with terminal/tty message

steps.name: Implement App event loop, ui::render() table, quit key, full TUI wiring
criteria: tui::run() calls probe, loads applications via load_all_applications(), runs event loop
ui::render() draws applications table with ratatui Widget trait
q / Esc / Ctrl-C quit cleanly restoring terminal via TerminalGuard Drop
ws_02 and ws_03 pass: bad/missing DATABASE_URL exit non-zero with error message

steps.name: Implement AppState navigation: move_down, move_up, move_to_first, move_to_last
criteria: move_down/up/to_first/to_last respect bounds; no panic on empty or filter-empty list
status_text() shows 'N of M applications' after navigation
us02_s01..s06, us02_e01..e02 pass; pbt_01 navigation invariant passes

steps.name: Implement set_filter, clear_filter, filtered_count, Mode transitions
criteria: set_filter() filters by company and job_title case-insensitively using plain substring (no regex)
Whitespace-only filter treated as empty; special regex chars do not panic
clear_filter() restores full list and resets selected_index to 0
us03_s01..s05, us03_e01..e02 pass; pbt_02 and pbt_03 pass

steps.name: Implement open_pdf() and handle_enter() dispatch
criteria: open_pdf(path) returns Err('File not found: {path}') when file absent, empty, or a directory
handle_enter() dispatches only in Normal mode with non-empty filtered list
